title: Impl: Claude (Anthropic) batch processing status mapping
description:
## GH: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/121

Map Claude Message Batches API lifecycle states to votecatcher MatchingStatus. Claude has simpler flow than OpenAI: in_progress → ended. Implement AnthropicBatchProvider mirroring OpenAIBatchProvider pattern.

**Deliverable:** AnthropicBatchProvider with status mapping + unit tests.
